name: Gift Card Grooming Scam
description: Scammer sends a small real payment to build trust then requests gift cards as good faith gesture

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I need a developer for a long-term project. I'll send you a sample payment of $50 so you can verify I am serious.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: Okay, I received it. What's the project about?

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I need you to purchase $50 in Steam gift cards for my nephew's birthday as a gesture of good faith before we begin.

red_flags: Trust-building micro payment to lower defenses
Gift card demand following initial payment
